rationale: CPU-only, API-bound multi-agent LLM pipeline (no GPU): all heavy computation is Gemini API calls. r7i.2xlarge (8 vCPU / 64 GiB RAM) is required because each problem subprocess holds a Pro-tier in-flight context (W=9 parallel solvers + grader ensemble + BS detector + grader3 chain + literature fetch), and we run all problems concurrently (max_parallel defaults to 10, sufficient for any plausible input). Empirically (2026-05-27): 4 GiB RAM is insufficient — Pro contexts OOM-kill; 64 GiB is comfortable and matches our validated configuration. 100 GB disk holds the Docker image (TeX Live subset for compile-verifying each LaTeX solution), per-run SQLite state, and grader3 fetched PDFs. Needs outbound HTTPS to the Gemini API + optionally the OpenAI API (cross-provider grader fallback) + SerpAPI (literature search) + arxiv.org / author homepages (PDF fetch).
